zh.lifeSummary: Ralph Russell於1626年之前出生。他於1663年10月12日與Mary Hitchcock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1675年2月28日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文易亞斯特 哈文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ralph Russell于1626年之前出生。他于1663年10月12日与Mary Hitchcock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1675年2月28日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文易亞斯特 哈文。

nameMeanings.name: Russell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: of Norman origin, from Old French and Anglo-Norman French r(o)ussel, a diminutive of Old French rous(e) ‘red, reddish’, used either as a nickname for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion, or as a personal name. Compare Rouse . This Norman name has been established in Ireland since the 12th century. It has been reinforced in Britain and Ireland by Huguenot bearers of the name Roussel, of the same Old French origin.

English: habitational name from any of several places called Rushall (Norfolk, Staffordshire, Wiltshire) or possibly sometimes from Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent). Rushall in Staffordshire derives from Old English rysc ‘rush, rushes’ + halh ‘nook, corner of land’. Rushall in Norfolk derives from an uncertain first element + Old English halh. Rushall in Wiltshire derives from an Old English personal name Rust (genitive Rustes) + halh. Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent) probably derives from Old English rust ‘rust, rust color’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’, but with a change in the final element due to influence from Middle English, Old English hall ‘hall, residence’, perhaps referring to a nearby building.
Americanized form of German Rüssel, from a pet form of any of various personal names formed with the element hrōd ‘fame, renown’.

variants.name: Russler
meanings: occupational name for a farmer, from an agent derivative of rüsseln ‘to shallow plow’.

variants.name: Rouse
meanings: English: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French rous(e) ‘red(-haired)’ (from Latin russ(e)us).
Walloon and northern French (Rousé): variant of Rosé (see Rose ).

variants.name: Russel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Russell  .
German: from a pet form of Russ, see Russ 2.
northwest German (Rüssel): probably a variant of Rossel .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.description: On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

en.lifeSummary: Ralph Russell was born before 1626. He married Mary Hitchcock on 12 October 1663, in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died before 28 February 1675, in East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Russellは1626年以前に生まれた。1663年10月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンでMary Hitchcockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1675年2月28日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンエアスト ヘイベンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Russell(은)는 1626년 이전 태어났다. 그는 1663년 10월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐에서 Mary Hitchcock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1675년 2월 28일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 이스트 하븐에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ralph Russell nasceu antes 1626. Ele casou-se com Mary Hitchcock em 12 de outubro de 1663, em New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 28 de fevereiro de 1675, em East Haven, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Ralph Russell родился перед 1626 г. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Hitchcock 12 октября 1663 г. в местности ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер перед 28 февраль 1675 г. в местности эаст хавен, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Ralph Russell nació antes de 1626. Se casó con Mary Hitchcock el 12 de octubre de 1663, en New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió antes de 28 de febrero de 1675, en East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
